creator: tirloni@usw-pr-web.sourceforge.net
text:
On Mon, 31 Dec 2001, Tony Maher wrote:

> Do you have any old modules from ports - like net/trafcount?
> If so remove and try rebooting wihtout it.  Then try reinstalling,
> something changed between Dec 12 and Dec 29.
> --
>   Tony Maher
>
>

 Yes, that was the problem. I was running trafcount. It works now that
 I've removed the module. Thanks very much.
